seoTitle: Connect ZoomInfo to HubSpot: Integration Guide
metaDescription: Sync your ZoomInfo database with HubSpot CRM by authorizing OAuth access, mapping contact fields, and automating B2B lead exports.
intro: Connecting ZoomInfo to HubSpot lets enriched B2B contact data, like direct phone numbers and job titles, flow straight into your CRM instead of being exported and imported manually. This guide covers authorizing the connection from ZoomInfo's Admin Portal, mapping data fields to matching HubSpot properties, and setting overwrite rules for record ownership. It ends with running a test export to confirm the sync works.

steps.heading: Open the ZoomInfo Admin Portal
steps.body: Log into your ZoomInfo Admin Portal and navigate to the Integrations tab.

steps.heading: Find the HubSpot connector
steps.body: Locate the native HubSpot app card and click Connect.

steps.heading: Authorize the connection
steps.body: Complete the HubSpot OAuth gateway and log in to grant profile permissions.

steps.heading: Select your target portal
steps.body: Choose your HubSpot accounts portal and confirm the handshake connection.

steps.heading: Map your data fields
steps.body: Match ZoomInfo fields like phone numbers and job titles to your HubSpot contact properties.

steps.heading: Set overwrite rules and test
steps.body: Define overwrite preferences, save your settings, and run a live search export to verify the sync.

faq.question: Does ZoomInfo push data into HubSpot automatically?
faq.answer: Once mapped and configured, you can set up automatic export triggers to push newly discovered leads into HubSpot.

faq.question: What data fields can I sync from ZoomInfo?
faq.answer: You can map fields like direct phone numbers, funding data, and job titles to matching HubSpot properties.

faq.question: Can I control which records get overwritten?
faq.answer: Yes, overwrite preferences let you define master record ownership rules during setup.

faq.question: How do I confirm the ZoomInfo integration is working?
faq.answer: Running a live search export test after saving your settings will verify the contact sync is functioning.
